live_evaluation_defaults.json_extraction: raw JSON array preferred; parser extracts JSON arrays from model text when needed
live_evaluation_defaults.max_output_tokens: dynamic, based on expected primitive count, capped per provider

notes: Commercial API behavior can drift after release. Use the released model outputs for the fixed paper snapshot.
The prompt audit is included as data/prompt_audit.csv and can be regenerated with scripts/audit_prompts.py.
